sections: HCM-1.3 descriptor-driven artifact registry proof gate

repo_truth: Fresh Review 2 after bounded remediation of Review 1. The exact staged subject now includes the seven implementation/proof/classification files, Review 1 dispatch, and the post-review-1 remediation proof wall. Review 1 found only trailing whitespace in the implementation proof wall; parent removed that whitespace and reran git diff --cached --check, git diff --check, cargo fmt --all -- --check, and cargo test -p handbook-engine --test hcm_1_3_artifact_registry. Review from live repo truth; inherit no prior verdict.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the nine-entry subject manifest and aggregate before review.
Review every byte of the subject files plus the selected HCM-1.3 SPEC, HCM-1.2 dependency boundary, runner, and handoff protocol as needed.
Run read-only cargo, Git, manifest, package, scope, fixed-consumer, and documentation checks as needed.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence and severity.
non_goals: No edits, staging changes, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No setup/doctor/product/flow/compiler/CLI/SDK/Tauri/Substrate/adoption claims beyond the exact subject.
Do not treat HCM-1.4, HCM-2, HCM-3, contracts, docks, content authority, semantic execution, or downstream release as started or closed.
tasks: Apply required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact nine-entry manifest and aggregate, and report BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Verify Review 1 remediation: no trailing whitespace remains and both cached and unstaged diff hygiene checks pass.
Verify the new public API names, result/error types, accessor contracts, immutable ownership, and construction source restrictions match the HCM-1.3 SPEC.
Verify registry membership and fields are descriptor/profile driven, not enum/table/filename/command/product driven.

Verify custom kind/instance, dependency provider/order, structural validation routing, deterministic ordering, trusted path carry-through, and no semantic/condition/vocabulary/Context Resolution/lifecycle/intake/renderer/Projection execution.
Verify HCM-1.2 fail-closed boundaries remain authoritative, no new numeric limits or input paths were added, and no package-owned definition assets changed.
Verify proof truthfulness: commands, package/archive equality, Windows proof, fixed-consumer inventory, scope set, GitNexus evidence, and classification ceiling.
Return CLEAN only if no actionable Critical or Required finding remains; otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED with bounded remediation.
contracts_and_gates: HCM-1.3 may close only the selected-profile registry owner boundary as BoundaryLanded.
PG-PROFILE-01, PG-KIND-01, PG-KIND-02, and PG-ARTIFACT-01 receive only the narrow HCM-1.3 subset; downstream/product gates remain open.
Final reviewed bytes must be committed before any parent closeout/ledger commit.
stop_conditions: Need to edit, stage, commit, or write a handoff/ledger from the review agent.
Need to widen beyond HCM-1.3 allowed files or later-slice behavior.
Required local proof cannot be run and cannot be replaced by existing proof evidence.
